summary.summary: Adds EversenseKit as a Git submodule and integrates Eversense CGM support into the app. The Xcode project and workspace were updated to include EversenseKit, the EversenseKit framework was added to the app's embedded frameworks, PluginManager was updated to import EversenseKit and register EversenseCGMManager as a CGM plugin, a "Eversense" entry was added to the CGM options list, and a localized title key for "Eversense" was added. The PR description also states the driver supports Eversense E3 (90/180 days) and Eversense 365 and mentions optional uploading to the Eversense DMS for debug data.
summary.userFacingImpact: Users will see a new "Eversense" CGM option in the app and the app will include the EversenseKit framework to support Eversense sensors. The PR description indicates the driver can upload debug data to the Eversense DMS as an opt-out feature. The author notes the change is still in Draft and that a few crashes are being investigated; the presence of those unresolved issues means this change should be reviewed and tested before release.
